meaning: n.<俗>(特指男孩子之间)密友,室友vi.结为密友(与up连用)
examples: LL: It's a good thing you didn't say, 'why so glum, chum?'
The lodge - keeper had a son who was a chum of Master Grossjay's.
How are we gonna get our truck in there, Pal? -just leaves it to me, chum!
Imagine Jack Nicholson, Tom Hanks or LeBron chum Jay Z limited by maximums on their earnings.
Meanwhile, a chum of mine working for a French wire service has a problem.
